hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CWD" ] && CWD="$PWD"; BRANCH=$(git -C "$CWD" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BRANCH" ] && exit 0; BRANCH_SAFE=$(echo "$BRANCH" | tr '/' '_'); PROJECT_KEY=$(echo "$CWD" | tr '/' '-'); MEMORY_DIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/${PROJECT_KEY}/memory"; mkdir -p "$MEMORY_DIR/branches"; BRANCH_FILE="$MEMORY_DIR/branches/${BRANCH_SAFE}.md"; [ -f "$BRANCH_FILE" ] || touch "$BRANCH_FILE"; GLOBAL_FILE="$MEMORY_DIR/global.md"; [ -f "$GLOBAL_FILE" ] || printf '# Global Notes
(Cross-branch notes go here)
' > "$GLOBAL_FILE"; { printf '<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: do not edit directly -->
'; printf '<!-- Current branch: %s -->
' "$BRANCH"; printf '<!-- Global notes  → memory/global.md -->
'; printf '<!-- Branch notes  → memory/branches/%s.md -->

' "$BRANCH_SAFE"; cat "$GLOBAL_FILE"; printf '
---

'; cat "$BRANCH_FILE"; } > "$MEMORY_DIR/MEMORY.md"
